label: Pipeline grade (< 10 ppm H2S)
notes: Reference purity — pipeline-spec CO2 from capture with deep sulphur removal; baseline failure rates

label: Industrial grade (10-200 ppm H2S)
notes: Moderate contaminant load — H2S/SO2/O2 traces accelerate carbon-steel corrosion and amplify near-wellbore geochemical scaling

label: Raw / sour gas stream (> 200 ppm H2S)
notes: Acid-gas co-injection — H2S forms sulphurous acid with water; severe corrosion of casing/cement/elastomers; pore-space competition reduces injectivity
